title: Register as client and enter client home
description: Verifies a new user can register as a client and is routed to the client entry screen after successful registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select the client role
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the client entry point
Verify the quick request experience is displayed

title: Register as provider and enter provider home
description: Verifies a new user can register as a provider and is routed to the provider entry screen after successful registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select the provider role
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the provider entry point
Verify the provider map experience is displayed

title: Client login routes to quick request
description: Verifies an existing client can log in and is routed to the client entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the client entry point
Verify the quick request experience is displayed

title: Create a quick request and see nearby providers
description: Verifies a client can create a service request from the quick request screen and then sees nearby providers displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a service category
Provide all required request details with valid values
Submit the service request
Verify nearby providers are displayed on the map

title: Provider goes online and accepts a request
description: Verifies a provider can toggle online, view request markers, inspect request details, accept a request, and see booking confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Toggle online status to available
Wait for request markers to appear on the map
Open a request marker to inspect its details
Accept the client request
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Choose cash payment and confirm booking marked paid
description: Verifies that a client can select cash as the payment method from tracking and see a payment confirmation with the booking marked as paid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Select cash as the payment method
Submit the selected payment method
Verify a payment confirmation is visible
Verify the booking is shown as paid

title: Send a chat message from an active tracking session
description: Verifies that a client can open an active booking in tracking, send a chat message, and see it appear in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Fill in a new chat message with a unique value into the message field
Send the chat message
Verify the sent chat message appears in the conversation thread

title: Choose card payment and complete in-app payment details submission
description: Verifies that a client can select card as the payment method in tracking, enter required payment details, submit, and see the booking marked as paid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Select card as the payment method
Fill valid payment details into the card payment form
Submit the payment
Verify a payment confirmation is visible
Verify the booking is shown as paid

title: View provider location and booking details on tracking map
description: Verifies that the tracking screen shows an active booking summary and displays the provider location on the map.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Verify active booking details are displayed
Verify the provider location is displayed on the map

title: Provider offline state prevents new request markers
description: Verifies a provider who is unavailable does not receive new incoming request markers on the map.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Toggle online status to unavailable
Wait for a short period while staying on the provider map screen
Verify no new request markers appear while unavailable

title: Observe location updates during tracking session
description: Verifies that provider location updates are reflected on the tracking map over time during an active session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Wait for provider location to update on the map
Verify the provider location changes on the map during the session

title: View platform statistics on admin dashboard
description: Verifies that an administrator can access the admin dashboard and see platform statistics and summaries displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the admin dashboard
Verify platform statistics and summary metrics are displayed

title: Verify a provider profile from the provider list
description: Verifies that an administrator can open the provider list, verify a provider profile, and see the verification status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the admin dashboard
Click to open the provider list
Select a provider from the list
Set the provider verification status to verified
Verify the selected provider is shown as verified in the provider details or list

title: Open chat thread from tracking and keep messages visible after leaving chat area
description: Verifies that messages in the tracking chat remain visible within the same session after navigating within the tracking screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Fill in a new chat message with a unique value into the message field
Send the chat message
Scroll the tracking screen away from the chat area
Scroll back to the chat area
Verify the conversation thread still displays the previously sent message

title: Quick request required field validation
description: Verifies the quick request form blocks submission when a required field is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a service category
Leave at least one required request detail field empty
Submit the service request
Verify a form validation error is visible
Verify the request is not submitted and the user remains in the quick request flow

title: Unverify a provider profile from the provider list
description: Verifies that an administrator can unverify a previously verified provider profile and see the verification status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the admin dashboard
Click to open the provider list
Select a provider currently shown as verified
Set the provider verification status to unverified
Verify the selected provider is shown as unverified in the provider details or list

title: Block payment submission when no payment method is selected
description: Verifies that the tracking payment UI requires choosing a payment method before submission and shows a validation error otherwise.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Attempt to submit payment without selecting a payment method
Verify a payment method validation error is visible

title: Open service catalog management from admin dashboard
description: Verifies that an administrator can navigate from the admin dashboard to the service catalog management area and see the catalog UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open the admin dashboard
Click to open service catalog management
Verify the service catalog management view is displayed

title: Prevent sending an empty chat message
description: Verifies that the tracking chat input enforces non-empty messages and does not add a new message when submitted empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Fill in an empty value into the message field
Attempt to send the chat message
Verify a chat input validation error is visible

title: Switch payment method selection before confirming
description: Verifies that a client can change the selected payment method on tracking before submission and the UI reflects the latest selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to open tracking for the active booking
Select card as the payment method
Select cash as the payment method
Verify cash is shown as the currently selected payment method

title: Invalid login is blocked with validation
description: Verifies a user cannot log in with missing or invalid credentials and remains on the login screen with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login screen
